name: azure-capacity-manager
description: Azure capacity, quota, and reservation management for SaaS ISVs. Adds an @azure-capacity-manager chat participant with full domain expertise for estate-level capacity governance.

chatParticipants.name: azure-capacity-manager
chatParticipants.description: Azure capacity, quota, and reservation management for SaaS ISVs operating workloads in ISV-owned subscriptions under EA or MCA.

commands.name: quota
commands.description: Quota analysis, increases, region access, and zonal enablement workflows

commands.name: reservation
commands.description: Capacity reservation group design, cost modeling, sharing, and overallocation

commands.name: quotagroup
commands.description: Quota group architecture, ARM lifecycle, transfers, and monitoring

commands.name: diagnose
commands.description: Diagnose AKS scaling failures, quota blocks, and capacity errors

commands.name: workshop
commands.description: ISV capacity governance workshop and engagement preparation
